jira.jqlFilter: project=MYAPP AND status="In Progress" AND assignee=currentUser()
jira.activeImplementedJql: project=MYAPP AND labels="ai-implemented" AND status NOT IN ("Done", "In Review")

stack.validateCmd: sf project deploy validate --source-dir force-app --target-org default
stack.apexTestCmd: sf apex run test --code-coverage --result-format human --wait 30 --target-org default
